positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a fantastical jungle scene at sunset. The composition features a central cluster of oversized, exotic flora—like bioluminescent lilies, stylized tropical leaves, and abstract fern patterns—framed by geometric jungle outlines. The main color palette should be rich jewel tones (deep emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasted with pops of neon teal and gold accents. Emphasize clean, thick silhouettes and strong, dramatic contrast. The style should be modern, graphic, and inspired by Art Deco and mid-century modern botanical illustrations. Full bleed, isolated design on a solid background.
